case_title: HENRIQUEZ, OSCAR ALVARADO et al vs. KING, DELORES et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-06-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SANCTION SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO APPEAR & FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH RULES OF COURT. HEARING SET FOR OCT-06-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-06-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-06-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-04-1994 CONTINUED FROM OCT-06-1994 TO NOV-04-1994 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-04-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON NOV-04-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TOTAL SANCTIONS $150.00. TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PER CRC 525., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-05-1994 CONTINUED FROM NOV-04-1994 TO DEC-05-1994 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-05-1994, DISMISSAL OSC DISCHARGED AND PLAINTIFF IN CONTEMPT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HENRIQUEZ, OSCAR ALVARADO HENRIQUEZ, MERCEDES AS TO DEFENDANT KING, DELORES DOES 1 TO 25 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-06-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-05-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-17-1994
